title: no more mistake
description: this data_pack allows to change stairs, walls back to blocks and more
body:
No more mistake

 

This data pack brings the ability to change stair walls and more back to the block in stone cutter. Perfect for those who often make the mistake of doing the wrong block stair or somthing else.

 

**example**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_4a7863a9-6161-4373-be44-ad43f7d67cb6.png)**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_4ae81996-fdec-4d5b-b71f-ed0519c8ff58.png)**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_f3b3ceb5-503f-4a22-b12f-9770828b8d99.png)**

  

**Installation Instructions:**

1.  Download the data pack and place it into the `datapacks` folder of your Minecraft world.
2.  Run the `/reload` command in your Minecraft world to activate the data pack.
